zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde於大約1290年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅時，她的父親Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders31歲，母親Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS21歲。她於1312年與Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne在荷蘭福利曼德奧斯特倫德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1373年11月25日在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達享年84歲，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde于大约1290年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅时，她的父亲Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders31岁，母亲Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS21岁。她于1312年与Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne在荷兰福利曼德奧斯特倫德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1373年11月25日在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達享年84岁，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde was born about 1290, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders, was 31 and her mother, Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS, was 21. She married Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne in 1312, in Oosterend, Friesland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 25 November 1373, in Lleida, Catalonia, Spain, at the age of 84, and was buried in Lleida, Catalonia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde est née environ 1290, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne en 1312, à Oosterend, Frise, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 25 novembre 1373, à Lleida, Catalunya, Espagne, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Lleida, Catalunya, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde um 1290 in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders 31 und ihre Mutter Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS 21. Sie hat 1312 in Oosterend, Friesland, Niederlande Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 25. November 1373 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Lleida, Catalunya, Spanien und wurde in Lleida, Catalunya, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde è nata il circa 1290 nel Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne nel 1312, nel Oosterend, Friesland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 novembre 1373, nel Lleida, Catalunya, Spagna, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a Lleida, Catalunya, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie De Flandre-Tenremondeが約1290年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flandersは31歳，母Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISISは21歳であった。1312年にオランダフリースランドオオステレンドでRobert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1373年11月25日にスペインカタルニーアレイダで84歳で死去し，スペインカタルニーアレイダにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde(이)가 대략 1290년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1312년 네덜란드 프리슬랜드 스테렌드에서 Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1373년 11월 25일 스페인 카털니아 레이다에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카털니아 레이다에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne em 1312, em Oosterend, Frísia, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 25 de novembro de 1373, em Lleida, Catalunya, Espanha, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Lleida, Catalunya, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde родилась около 1290 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne в 1312 г. в местности устиренд, фриесланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 25 ноября 1373 г. в местности ллида, каталуня, Испания в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности ллида, каталуня, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde nació aproximadamente 1290, en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne en 1312, en Oosterend, Frisia, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de noviembre de 1373, en Lérida, Cataluña, España, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultada en Lérida, Cataluña, España.
